# MyToolsHub - robots.txt
# https://www.robotstxt.org/robotstxt.html

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Disallow non-indexable paths
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /404
Disallow: /500
Disallow: /*.json$
Disallow: /cdn-cgi/

# Crawl delay for heavy crawlers
User-agent: AhrefsBot
Crawl-delay: 10

User-agent: SemrushBot
Crawl-delay: 10

User-agent: MJ12bot
Disallow: /

# Sitemaps
Sitemap: https://mytoolshub.store/sitemap.xml
